findings.description: s3 hints are missing `FailureLog_DerivedExecutionInfo`. This cross-reference is used in s3 content (in the note about 処理対象データ), so users asking about 派生元実行時情報 output may not find this section via hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `:ref:`FailureLog_DerivedExecutionInfo`` appears in the 処理対象データ note. Knowledge s3 content: "詳細は :ref:`FailureLog_DerivedExecutionInfo` を参照。" — but it is absent from the hints array.

findings.description: s4 hints are missing `FailureLog_AppMsgId` and `FailureLog_FwMsgId`. Both cross-references appear in the s4 section content describing how to change failure codes at runtime, so queries about failure code overrides may not route to s4.
findings.source_evidence: Source section 障害ログの出力方法: "アプリケーションの障害コードの変更方法については、:ref:`FailureLog_AppMsgId` を参照" and "フレームワークで例外が発生した場合の障害コードの変更方法については、:ref:`FailureLog_FwMsgId` を参照". Knowledge s4 content includes both references but they are absent from hints.
